_comment: M-PROOFS-A baseline frozen 2026-04-28 (schema v2). proof_honesty_audit.py distinguishes structural vs tautological axiom-only @theorems via host-stdlib axiom-index lookup. The CI gate re-runs the audit and refuses to merge any commit that REGRESSES below these counts. Increases (more multi-step / structural, fewer placeholder / tautological) are always welcome and the baseline can be raised by the corpus maintainer.
_baseline_iteration: M-PROOFS-A schema-v2 + Corollary 10.5 conservativity witness-parameterised promotion

totals_min._invariant: running totals must satisfy: total[k] >= totals_min[k] for monotone metrics, total[k] <= totals_max[k] for the trivial counters.
